description: Document project scope, goals, and success criteria for AI adoption
Identify and onboard team members from data science, IT, and business units
Present project charter and get sign-off from leadership
Assess current databases, data pipelines, and data quality
Document end-to-end processes for demand forecasting, routing, and inventory

task_name: Identify data gaps and quality issues
description: Gap analysis report comparing available data vs requirements for AI models
Evaluate and prioritize: demand forecasting, route optimization, inventory mgmt, customer support

task_name: Define success criteria for each use case
description: Set measurable KPIs: 15% reduction in delivery delays, 10% cost reduction
Compare cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, Azure ML, GCP Vertex AI)
Extract 2 years of demand data from ERP system
Build automated pipeline for data cleaning, normalization, feature engineering
Select algorithm (LSTM, Prophet, XGBoost), define input features
Graph-based optimization with constraints (time windows, vehicle capacity)
Automated training, validation, and model versioning

task_name: Deploy demand model to test environment
description: Deploy to staging, set up monitoring, define test scenarios
2-week pilot with 3 logistics coordinators using demand forecasting predictions
Survey users, measure prediction accuracy, compare with manual forecasts

task_name: Iterate on model based on feedback
description: Adjust features, retrain model, validate improvements
Infrastructure scaling, rollback plan, monitoring setup
Train 25 logistics staff on using AI-powered forecasting dashboard
Go-live for demand forecasting across all 3 distribution centers
Model performance dashboards, drift detection alerts, retraining triggers
Final report: outcomes vs targets, lessons learned, recommendations for Phase 2
Penetration testing and vulnerability assessment - BLOCKED: waiting for security team availability
Review data privacy compliance for using customer delivery data in ML models
